# Agent Artifact

> Portable durable deliverables for agent systems: artifact identity, kinds, parts, byte refs, versions, operations, diffs, previews, exports, source links, and handoff packages.

Site: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/
Repository: https://github.com/limecloud/agentartifact
Version: v0.1.0

## Start

- What is Agent Artifact?: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/what-is-agent-artifact
- Specification: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/specification
- Artifact model: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/concepts/artifact-model
- JSON Schemas: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/reference/json-schemas

## Core contracts

- Artifact envelope: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/contracts/artifact-envelope
- Artifact parts: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/contracts/artifact-parts
- Versions and snapshots: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/contracts/versions-and-snapshots
- Operations and diffs: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/contracts/operations-and-diffs
- Source links: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/contracts/source-links
- Render manifest: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/contracts/render-manifest
- Export manifest: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/contracts/export-manifest
- Handoff package: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/contracts/handoff-package
- Interoperability: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/contracts/interoperability

## Examples

- Report document: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/examples/report-document
- Image output: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/examples/image-output
- Transcript correction: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/examples/transcript-correction
- Browser snapshot: https://limecloud.github.io/agentartifact/en/examples/browser-snapshot

## Related standards

- Agent Knowledge: https://limecloud.github.io/agentknowledge/
- Agent UI: https://limecloud.github.io/agentui/
- Agent Runtime: https://limecloud.github.io/agentruntime/
- Agent Evidence: https://limecloud.github.io/agentevidence/
- Agent Policy: https://limecloud.github.io/agentpolicy/
